column3: Circle Fade In. White background. Red circle (#E53935), 150px diameter, centered. Animation: Fade from 0% to 100% opacity over 1.2s (ease-out). Hold 2.8s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Scale In. Light grey background (#F5F5F5). Blue circle (#1976D2), 180px diameter, centered. Animation: Scale from 0% to 100% over 1s (elastic ease with slight overshoot to 105%, settle to 100%). Hold 3s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Slide Left. Black background. Yellow circle (#FDD835), 160px diameter. Starts off-screen right (x: +120% canvas width). Slides to center over 1.5s (ease-out deceleration). Hold 2.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Slide Up. Gradient background (#E3F2FD to #BBDEFB, top to bottom). Green circle (#43A047), 140px diameter. Starts off-screen bottom (y: +120% canvas height). Rises to center over 1.3s with gravity simulation (ease-out, decelerates as it rises). Hold 2.7s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Drop Gravity. White background. Purple circle (#7B1FA2), 170px diameter. Starts off-screen top (y: -120% height). Drops to center with gravity acceleration (ease-in, speeds up), bounces once (goes 30px below center, bounces 10px up, settles) over 1.6s total. Hold 2.4s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Rotate 360. Dark grey background (#424242). Orange circle (#FF6F00), 155px diameter with small white dot offset from center to show rotation. Centered. Rotates continuously 360° clockwise over 2s (linear speed). Completes rotation, holds static 2s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Opacity Pulse. Soft blue background (#E1F5FE). Cyan circle (#00ACC1), 165px diameter, centered. Animation: Pulse opacity 100% → 30% → 100% over 2s (smooth sine wave). Complete 2 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Blur Focus. White background. Red circle (#D32F2F), 175px diameter, centered. Starts heavily blurred (blur radius 20px, opacity 40%). Sharpens to crystal clear over 2s (blur reduces to 0px, opacity to 100%). Hold sharp 2s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Glow Effect. Black background. White circle (#FFFFFF), 150px diameter, centered. Circle has outer glow (0px 0px 30px rgba(255,255,255,0.8)). Glow intensity pulses: 0.3 → 0.9 → 0.3 alpha over 2.5s. Complete 1.5 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Color Morph. Light background (#FAFAFA). Circle 160px diameter, centered. Starts red (#F44336), morphs to blue (#2196F3) over 2s (smooth color transition). Morphs blue to green (#4CAF50) over 2s. Total duration: 4s.
Rectangle Fade In. White background. Blue rectangle (#1565C0), 300px × 180px, centered, border-radius 12px. Fades from 0% to 100% opacity over 1.4s (ease-out). Hold 2.6s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Scale In. Gradient background (#FCE4EC to #F8BBD0). Pink rectangle (#EC407A), 320px × 200px, centered, border-radius 16px. Scales from 0% to 100% over 1.2s (elastic with overshoot to 108%, settle). Hold 2.8s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Slide Right. Dark background (#212121). Orange rectangle (#FF6F00), 280px × 160px, rounded corners 10px. Starts off-screen left (x: -120%). Slides to center over 1.6s (ease-out). Hold 2.4s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Width Expand. Light grey background. Green rectangle (#388E3C), starts 0px × 180px (invisible), centered vertically. Expands width from 0px to 350px over 1.8s (ease-out), height stays 180px. Hold 2.2s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Height Grow. White background. Purple rectangle (#7B1FA2), 250px × 0px (invisible), centered horizontally, bottom edge at 70% canvas height. Grows height from 0px to 300px upward over 1.5s (ease-out). Hold 2.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Rotate 90. Soft background (#F3E5F5). Blue rectangle (#5E35B1), 300px × 150px, centered, rounded 8px. Rotates 90° clockwise around center over 1.3s (ease-in-out). Hold rotated 2.7s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Shadow Grow. White background. Dark grey rectangle (#616161), 280px × 170px, centered, rounded 12px. Starts with small shadow (0px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)). Shadow grows to (0px 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) over 2s. Hold 2s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Border Pulse. Light background. White rectangle (#FFFFFF), 290px × 180px, centered, rounded 10px. Starts with 2px blue border (#2196F3). Border thickness pulses: 2px → 6px → 2px over 2s. Complete 2 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Gradient Shift. Dark background. Rectangle 310px × 190px, centered, rounded 14px. Starts with gradient (left #E91E63 pink to right #9C27B0 purple). Gradient shifts: purple moves from right to left over 3s (gradient endpoint positions change). Hold 1s. Total duration: 4s.

Rectangle Skew Transform. Grey background (#BDBDBD). Yellow rectangle (#FBC02D), 270px × 160px, centered. Starts normal (0° skew). Skews 15° horizontally over 1.5s (transforms to parallelogram shape). Returns to 0° over 1.5s. Hold 1s. Total duration: 4s.
Triangle Fade In. White background. Red equilateral triangle (#D32F2F), 200px base, pointing up, centered. Fades from 0% to 100% over 1.3s (ease-out). Hold 2.7s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Scale In. Light blue background (#E1F5FE). Blue triangle (#0277BD), 180px base, pointing up, centered. Scales from 0% to 100% over 1.1s (elastic overshoot to 110%, settle). Hold 2.9s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Slide Down. Gradient background (#FFF3E0 to #FFE0B2). Orange triangle (#F57C00), 190px base, pointing down. Starts off-screen top (y: -120%). Drops to center over 1.4s with slight bounce (overshoots 15px, bounces back). Hold 2.6s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Rotate 120. Dark background (#263238). Green triangle (#43A047), 200px base, pointing up, centered. Rotates 120° clockwise over 1.6s (ease-in-out), now pointing down-right. Hold 2.4s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Flip Vertical. White background. Purple triangle (#8E24AA), 185px base, pointing up, centered. Flips vertically (3D rotation around horizontal axis): rotates 180° over 1.5s, now pointing down. Hold 2.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Color Cycle. Grey background (#E0E0E0). Triangle 195px base, pointing right, centered. Starts yellow (#FFEB3B), morphs to green (#4CAF50) over 1.3s, morphs to blue (#2196F3) over 1.3s, morphs to red (#F44336) over 1.4s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Stroke Animation. Black background. Triangle 210px base, no fill (transparent), 4px white stroke (#FFFFFF), pointing up, centered. Stroke draws on from bottom-left corner clockwise, completing full triangle outline over 2.5s (stroke-dasharray animation). Hold complete 1.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Glow Pulse. Dark blue background (#0D47A1). Yellow triangle (#FDD835), 175px base, pointing up, centered, with outer glow (0px 0px 25px rgba(253,216,53,0.7)). Glow pulses: alpha 0.3 → 1.0 → 0.3 over 2s. Complete 2 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Scale Directional. Light background. Red triangle (#E53935), 180px base, pointing right, centered. Scales horizontally (stretches width) from 100% to 150% over 1.5s, height stays constant. Returns to 100% over 1.5s. Hold 1s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Opacity Wave. White background. Three blue triangles (#1976D2), each 120px base, arranged in row (150px apart), all pointing up. Opacity wave passes left to right: Triangle 1 fades 100% → 30% → 100% (1s), then Triangle 2 does same (1s), then Triangle 3 (1s). All hold 100% for 1s. Total duration: 4s.
Line Fade In. White background. Horizontal line, 400px length, 4px thickness, dark grey (#424242), centered. Fades from 0% to 100% over 1.2s. Hold 2.8s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Draw On Horizontal. Light background. Horizontal line 450px length, 3px thick, blue (#2196F3), centered. Draws from left to right (starts 0px, extends to 450px) over 2s (linear speed). Hold complete 2s. Total duration: 4s.
Line Draw On Vertical. Dark background (#1A1A1A). Vertical line 500px length, 5px thick, white (#FFFFFF), centered. Draws from top to bottom over 1.8s (linear). Hold 2.2s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Thickness Pulse. Grey background. Horizontal line 380px, centered. Starts 2px thick red (#F44336). Thickness pulses: 2px → 8px → 2px over 2s (smooth transition). Complete 2 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Line Rotate Sweep. White background. Line 300px length, 3px thick, black, starts horizontal centered. Rotates 180° clockwise around center point (sweeps like clock hand) over 2.5s. Hold at 180° for 1.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Color Gradient Shift. Dark background. Horizontal line 420px, 6px thick, centered. Gradient from left red (#F44336) to right blue (#2196F3). Gradient shifts: red moves left to right over 3s (gradient start/end points translate). Hold 1s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Dash Animation. Light grey background. Horizontal line 400px, 4px, black, centered. Starts solid. Becomes dashed (20px dash, 10px gap) over 1.5s. Dashes animate (march to the right) for 2.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Glow Effect. Black background. Horizontal line 350px, 3px, white, centered, with glow (0px 0px 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.6)). Glow pulses: blur radius 5px → 25px → 5px over 2s. Complete 2 pulses. Total duration: 4s.

Diagonal Line Slide. White background. Diagonal line (45° angle), 400px length, 4px thick, purple (#9C27B0). Starts off-screen top-left. Slides to center along diagonal path over 1.6s (ease-out). Hold 2.4s. Total duration: 4s.

Line Length Oscillate. Gradient background. Horizontal line, starts 100px length, 5px thick, green (#4CAF50), centered. Length oscillates: extends to 400px over 1s, shrinks to 100px over 1s. Complete 2 oscillations. Total duration: 4s.
Square Fade In. White background. Blue square (#1E88E5), 180px × 180px, centered, no border-radius (sharp corners). Fades 0% to 100% over 1.3s. Hold 2.7s. Total duration: 4s.

Square Rotate Diamond. Light background. Red square (#E53935), 160px × 160px, centered. Rotates 45° clockwise (becomes diamond orientation) over 1.4s (ease-in-out). Hold as diamond 2.6s. Total duration: 4s.

Square Scale Corners. Dark background. Orange square (#FF6F00), 170px × 170px, centered, with 8px border-radius. Border-radius animates: 8px → 40px (very rounded) over 1.5s, returns to 8px over 1.5s. Hold 1s. Total duration: 4s.

Square Split Four. White background. Purple square (#7B1FA2), 200px × 200px, centered. Splits into 4 smaller squares (100px × 100px each): they separate outward from center, each moving 30px in their corner direction over 1.5s. Hold separated 1s. Merge back together over 1.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Square Shadow Direction. Light grey background. Green square (#43A047), 175px × 175px, centered. Shadow starts bottom-right (4px 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)). Shadow position rotates around square: moves to bottom-left over 1.3s, to top-left over 1.3s, to top-right over 1.4s. Total duration: 4s.
Pentagon Fade In. White background. Regular pentagon (5 equal sides), 180px diameter, blue (#1976D2), one point facing up, centered. Fades 0% to 100% over 1.2s. Hold 2.8s. Total duration: 4s.

Pentagon Rotate. Dark background. Yellow pentagon (#FBC02D), 170px diameter, centered. Rotates 72° clockwise (one point position) over 1.6s. Continues rotating another 72° over 1.6s (total 144°). Hold 0.8s. Total duration: 4s.

Pentagon Stroke Draw. Light background. Pentagon 190px diameter, no fill, 4px red stroke (#D32F2F), centered. Stroke draws on starting from top point, going clockwise around all 5 sides over 2.5s. Hold complete 1.5s. Total duration: 4s.
Star Five Points Fade. Black background. Five-point star, 200px diameter (point to opposite point), gold (#FFD700), centered. Fades in 0% to 100% over 1.4s. Hold 2.6s. Total duration: 4s.

Star Rotate Sparkle. White background. Five-point star, 160px diameter, yellow (#FFEB3B), centered, with outer glow (0px 0px 20px rgba(255,235,59,0.8)). Rotates 360° clockwise over 2s (continuous spin). Glow simultaneously pulses alpha 0.4 → 1.0 → 0.4 once during rotation. Hold 2s. Total duration: 4s.

Triangle Stroke Animation. Black background. Triangle 210px base, no fill (transparent), 4px white stroke (#FFFFFF), pointing up, centered. Stroke draws on from bottom-left corner clockwise, completing full triangle outline over 2.5s (stroke-dasharray animation). Hold complete 1.5s. Total duration: 4s.

Circle Breathing Loop. Soft grey background (#F5F5F5). Blue circle (#42A5F5), 160px diameter, centered. Animation: Gentle breathing scale loop - scales 100% → 108% over 1.5s (ease-in-out), scales 108% → 100% over 1.5s. Completes 2 full breath cycles. Total duration: 6s.

Circle Stretch React. White background. Red circle (#EF5350), 150px diameter, centered. Animation (5s): 0-2s: Circle appears (fade in 0.5s), holds 1.5s. 2-3.5s: Stretches horizontally (width 150% height stays 100%), returns to normal. 3.5-5s: Gentle pulse scale 100% → 105% → 100%. Total duration: 5s.

Circle Split Merge. Dark background (#263238). Purple circle (#AB47BC), 180px diameter, centered. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Appears and holds. 2-3.5s: Splits into two circles (each 120px), they separate 80px apart horizontally. 3.5-5s: Two circles move back together. 5-6s: Merge back into one 180px circle. Total duration: 6s.

Circle Color Breathing Combo. Gradient background (#E8EAF6 to #C5CAE9). Circle 170px, centered. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Fades in as cyan (#00BCD4). 1.5-3s: While breathing (scale 100% ↔ 110%), morphs color to magenta (#E91E63). 3-4.5s: Continues breathing, morphs to yellow (#FFEB3B). 4.5-7s: Breathing continues as yellow. Total duration: 7s.

Circle Rotate Scale Combine. Black background. Orange circle (#FF9800), 155px, centered, with small white dot on edge (to show rotation). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Rotates 180° while simultaneously scaling 100% → 150%. 2-4s: Continues rotating another 180° (total 360°) while scaling 150% → 100%. 4-6s: Gentle rotation wobble ±15° twice. Total duration: 6s.

Circle Opacity Fade Pulse. White background. Green circle (#66BB6A), 165px, centered. Animation (5s): 0-1.5s: Fades in to 100%. 1.5-3.5s: Pulses opacity 100% → 20% → 100% (smooth sine). 3.5-5s: Fades out to 0%. Total duration: 5s.

Circle Bounce Physics. Light background. Red circle (#F44336), 140px. Starts at top (20% from top), centered horizontally. Animation (5s): Drops with gravity, bounces on bottom (80% height position). First bounce reaches 60% height, second bounce 70% height, settles at 80%. Each bounce has realistic arc (ease-in falling, ease-out rising). Total duration: 5s.

Circle Glow Intensity Wave. Black background. White circle (#FFFFFF), 150px, centered, with glow (0px 0px 0px rgba(255,255,255,0)). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Glow builds from 0px to 40px blur, alpha 0 to 1. 2-4s: Glow pulses: blur 40px ↔ 60px, alpha 1 ↔ 0.5 (2 pulses). 4-6s: Glow fades: blur 60px → 0px, alpha 0.5 → 0. Total duration: 6s.

Circle Border Grow Transform. Grey background (#BDBDBD). Circle 160px, starts as solid blue (#2196F3), centered. Animation (5s): 0-1.5s: Solid circle appears. 1.5-3s: Transforms to outlined circle (fill becomes transparent, 4px blue stroke appears). 3-4s: Stroke thickness grows 4px → 12px. 4-5s: Stroke animates drawing pattern (dashed appearance). Total duration: 5s.

Circle Ellipse Morph. White background. Circle 170px, purple (#9C27B0), centered. Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Circle appears. 1.5-3.5s: Morphs into horizontal ellipse (width 280px, height 120px). 3.5-5.5s: Morphs into vertical ellipse (width 120px, height 280px). 5.5-6s: Returns to circle 170px. Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Width Wave. Light blue background. Orange rectangle (#FB8C00), starts 300px × 150px, centered, rounded 10px. Animation (6s): 0-1s: Appears. 1-3s: Width oscillates: 300px → 450px → 300px → 200px → 300px (smooth wave). Height constant. 3-6s: Height oscillates: 150px → 220px → 150px → 100px → 150px. Width constant. Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Corner Round. Dark background. Blue rectangle (#1E88E5), 320px × 180px, starts sharp corners (radius 0px), centered. Animation (5s): 0-1.5s: Appears. 1.5-3s: Corners become fully rounded (radius 90px, creating pill shape). 3-4.5s: Returns to sharp (radius 90px → 0px). 4.5-5s: Settles. Total duration: 5s.

Rectangle 3D Rotate. White background. Red rectangle (#E53935), 280px × 160px, rounded 12px, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1s: Appears. 1-3s: 3D rotation around vertical Y-axis: 0° → 90° (edge-on, appears as thin line) → 180° (back-facing). 3-5s: Continues 180° → 270° → 360° (returns front-facing). 5-6s: Slight wobble ±5°. Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Shadow Travel. Light grey background. Green rectangle (#43A047), 290px × 170px, rounded 8px, centered. Animation (6s): Rectangle stays static. Shadow travels around: 0-1.5s: Shadow at bottom-right (6px 6px 12px). 1.5-3s: Shadow moves to bottom-left (-6px 6px 12px). 3-4.5s: Shadow moves to top-left (-6px -6px 12px). 4.5-6s: Shadow moves to top-right (6px -6px 12px). Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Gradient Rotate. Black background. Rectangle 310px × 185px, rounded 14px, centered. Starts with gradient 0° (top #E91E63 pink to bottom #9C27B0 purple). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Appears. 2-4s: Gradient angle rotates 0° → 180° (purple now on top). 4-6s: Gradient angle rotates 180° → 360° (back to original). Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Skew Dance. White background. Yellow rectangle (#FDD835), 270px × 160px, rounded 10px, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1s: Appears. 1-2.5s: Skews right (15° horizontal skew). 2.5-4s: Returns to 0°, then skews left (-15°). 4-5.5s: Returns to 0°. 5.5-6s: Slight vertical skew ±5° wobble. Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Split Grid. Dark blue background. Orange rectangle (#FF6F00), 300px × 200px, centered, rounded 8px. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Appears. 1.5-3s: Splits into 4 rectangles (150px × 100px each in 2×2 grid), they separate with 40px gaps. 3-5s: Each piece rotates independently 90° in different directions. 5-7s: Pieces move back together and merge into original rectangle. Total duration: 7s.

Rectangle Border Pulse Color. Light background. White rectangle (#FFFFFF), 300px × 180px, centered, rounded 12px. Starts with 3px blue border (#2196F3). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Appears. 2-4s: Border pulses: thickness 3px → 8px → 3px, simultaneously color morphs blue → red (#F44336) → blue. 4-6s: Another pulse: 3px → 10px → 3px, color blue → green (#4CAF50) → blue. Total duration: 6s.

Rectangle Perspective Tilt. Grey background. Purple rectangle (#8E24AA), 280px × 170px, centered. Animation (5s): 0-1s: Appears. 1-3s: 3D perspective tilt around horizontal X-axis: tilts forward 45° (top edge farther, bottom closer - trapezoid effect). 3-5s: Returns to flat 0°. Total duration: 5s.

Rectangle Opacity Pattern. Black background. Three rectangles (each 200px × 120px, rounded 10px, cyan #00BCD4) arranged vertically (60px apart), centered. Animation (6s): 0-2s: All appear at 100%. 2-4s: Opacity wave top to bottom: top fades to 30%, middle fades to 30%, bottom fades to 30% (each with 0.5s stagger). 4-6s: Opacity wave reverses: all return to 100% in same pattern. Total duration: 6s.

Triangle Spin Wobble. White background. Red triangle (#D32F2F), 190px base, pointing up, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Appears. 1.5-3.5s: Spins 360° clockwise smoothly. 3.5-6s: Wobbles: rotates ±15° back and forth 3 times (like shaking head no). Total duration: 6s.

Triangle Point Morph. Light background. Blue triangle (#1976D2), 180px base, pointing up, centered. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Appears pointing up. 1.5-3s: Top point extends upward (triangle gets taller, 180px → 260px height). 3-4.5s: Returns to normal 180px. 4.5-6s: Base widens (180px → 260px width). 6-7s: Returns to normal 180px base. Total duration: 7s.

Triangle Color Vertex. Dark background. Triangle 200px, centered. Starts solid yellow (#FFEB3B). Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Appears. 1.5-4s: Each vertex becomes different color (top red #F44336, bottom-left blue #2196F3, bottom-right green #4CAF50), gradient fills between vertices. 4-6s: Colors blend back to uniform yellow. Total duration: 6s.

Triangle 3D Flip. White background. Green triangle (#43A047), 185px, pointing right, centered. Animation (5s): 0-1s: Appears. 1-3s: 3D flip around vertical axis: 0° → 180° (flips to point left). 3-5s: Flips back 180° → 360° (points right again). Total duration: 5s.

Triangle Stroke Fill. Black background. Triangle 195px, centered. Starts as outline only (4px white stroke, no fill). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Stroke draws on clockwise from top point. 2-4s: Fill color (yellow #FDD835) fades in from 0% to 100% inside outline. 4-6s: Stroke fades out, leaving solid yellow triangle. Total duration: 6s.

Triangle Shatter Reform. Grey background. Orange triangle (#FF9800), 180px, centered. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Appears solid. 1.5-3s: Breaks into 6 smaller triangular pieces, they scatter outward 50px in random directions. 3-5s: Pieces hold scattered. 5-7s: Pieces move back together, reforming original triangle. Total duration: 7s.

Triangle Breathing Glow. Dark blue background. White triangle (#FFFFFF), 170px, centered, with glow (0px 0px 20px rgba(255,255,255,0.6)). Animation (6s): Simultaneously breathes (scale 100% ↔ 112%, 2s cycle) and glow pulses (blur 10px ↔ 35px, 2s cycle). Completes 3 synchronized breath+glow cycles. Total duration: 6s.

Triangle Corner Round. Light background. Purple triangle (#9C27B0), 190px, sharp points, centered. Animation (5s): 0-1.5s: Appears. 1.5-3.5s: Corner points become rounded (border-radius effect, each corner rounds with 30px radius, shape becomes more blob-like). 3.5-5s: Returns to sharp points. Total duration: 5s.

Triangle Extrude Effect. White background. Blue triangle (#1E88E5), 175px, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Appears flat (2D). 1.5-4s: Appears to extrude into 3D: duplicate layers offset behind with decreasing opacity (creates depth illusion - 5 layers, each 4px offset down-right, opacity 80% → 20%). 4-6s: Layers collapse back to flat single triangle. Total duration: 6s.

Triangle Orbit Path. Black background. Small yellow triangle (#FFEB3B), 80px, pointing up. Large invisible circle (300px diameter, centered) acts as orbit path. Animation (6s): Triangle starts at top of orbit circle. Travels clockwise around orbit circle perimeter over 6s (completes full circular orbit). Triangle rotates to always point outward from center as it orbits. Total duration: 6s.

Line Multi-Segment Draw. White background. Complex path: 5 connected line segments forming a zigzag (total path length ~500px), 4px thick, blue (#2196F3), centered. Animation (6s): 0-5s: Path draws on sequentially: segment 1 (1s), segment 2 (1s), segment 3 (1s), segment 4 (1s), segment 5 (1s). 5-6s: Complete path holds. Total duration: 6s.

Line Thickness Wave. Dark background. Horizontal line 400px, white, centered. Starts 3px thick. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Thickness wave travels left to right: starts 3px, middle becomes 10px, ends 3px (wave bump travels across). 2-4s: Another wave right to left. 4-6s: Line settles at 5px thick uniformly. Total duration: 6s.

Line Color Gradient Flow. Light grey background. Horizontal line 450px, 5px thick, centered. Gradient from left red (#F44336) to right blue (#2196F3). Animation (6s): 0-3s: Gradient flows: red position moves left to right (like liquid flowing through pipe). 3-6s: Gradient flows reverse: right to left. Total duration: 6s.

Line Dotted Dash Morph. White background. Horizontal line 400px, 4px, black, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Solid line appears. 1.5-3s: Morphs to dashed (30px dash, 15px gap). 3-4.5s: Dashes become dots (8px dash, 12px gap). 4.5-6s: Returns to solid. Total duration: 6s.

Line Spiral Draw. Black background. Spiral line (starts from center, spirals outward making 3 loops, total length ~600px), 3px thick, gold (#FFD700), centered. Animation (7s): 0-6s: Spiral draws from center outward continuously. 6-7s: Complete spiral holds. Total duration: 7s.

Line Glow Intensity Build. Dark blue background. Horizontal line 380px, 4px, cyan (#00BCD4), centered. Starts with no glow. Animation (5s): 0-2s: Glow builds gradually: blur 0px → 30px, alpha 0 → 0.9. 2-4s: Glow pulses: blur 30px ↔ 45px (2 pulses). 4-5s: Glow fades: blur 45px → 0px, alpha 0.9 → 0. Total duration: 5s.

Line Angle Sweep. White background. Line 350px, 4px, purple, centered. Starts horizontal (0°). Animation (6s): Line rotates around center point, sweeping like clock hand: 0° → 180° over 3s, continues 180° → 360° over 3s (complete circle). Total duration: 6s.

Line Split Multi. Grey background. Horizontal line 400px, 5px, red, centered. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Single line appears. 1.5-3s: Splits into 3 parallel lines (each 400px × 2px, 20px vertical spacing). 3-5s: Three lines wave vertically (sine wave motion, offset phases). 5-7s: Lines merge back into single 400px × 5px line. Total duration: 7s.

Line Perpendicular Cross. Black background. Two lines: horizontal 300px and vertical 300px, both 4px white, intersecting at center forming cross. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Horizontal line draws left to right. 2-4s: Vertical line draws top to bottom. 4-6s: Both lines pulse thickness: 4px → 8px → 4px simultaneously. Total duration: 6s.

Line Neon Flicker. Dark background. Horizontal line 420px, 5px, bright pink (#FF1493), centered, with neon glow (0px 0px 20px rgba(255,20,147,0.8)). Animation (5s): Mimics neon sign flicker: 0-0.2s: Off (opacity 0%). 0.2-0.3s: On flicker (opacity 100% → 50% → 100%). 0.3-3s: Stable on with subtle glow pulse. 3-3.2s: Flicker (opacity 100% → 30% → 100%). 3.2-5s: Stable on. Total duration: 5s.

Square Perspective Cube. White background. Blue square (#1976D2), 180px, centered. Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Flat square appears. 1.5-4s: 3D perspective transform creates cube illusion: square tilts, duplicate edges appear offset creating 3D cube wireframe effect. 4-6s: Cube rotates 45° showing different face, returns to flat square. Total duration: 6s.

Square Corner Detach. Light background. Red square (#E53935), 200px, centered. Animation (7s): 0-1.5s: Solid square appears. 1.5-3.5s: Four corners detach (each corner becomes 40px triangle), corners move 30px outward from square. 3.5-5.5s: Corners rotate 90° independently. 5.5-7s: Corners return and reattach forming square. Rotating Wheel Spokes. Light background. One circle (black #212121, 160px diameter) placed at the center acts as a wheel rim. Inside the circle four thin lines (160px length, 6px thickness, gray #616161) pass through the center forming cross spokes: one horizontal, one vertical, and two diagonal lines at 45°. All lines are fixed to the center of the circle like wheel spokes. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Circle and all four lines fade in together at center. 1-6s: The entire wheel system (circle and all attached lines) rotates continuously around its center completing two full rotations (0° -> 720°). The spokes remain fixed relative to the circle and rotate together with it. 6-8s: Rotation gradually slows until the wheel stops at its original orientation. Total duration: 8s.

Rotating Wheel Spokes. Light background. One circle (black #212121, 160px diameter) placed at the center acts as a wheel rim. Basic Pie Chart Reveal. White background. Circle (300px diameter, centered). Acts as a pie chart with two slices: Blue (#2196F3) for 70%, Green (#4CAF50) for 30%. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Blue slice draws in radially from top center (0°) to 252° (using conic-gradient sweep). 2-4s: Green slice draws in from 252° to 360°, completing the circle. 4-6s: Hold complete. Total duration: 6s.

Donut Chart with Metric Counter. Light grey background (#F5F5F5). Donut chart (280px diameter, 40px thickness, centered). Base ring is light grey (#E0E0E0). Progress ring is purple (#9C27B0). In the center: Text '0%'. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Base ring fades in. 1-4s: Progress ring draws radially from 0° to 270° (75% full). Simultaneously, center text counts up from '0%' to '75%'. 4-5s: Text pulses slightly (scale 100% -> 110% -> 100%). 5-7s: Hold. Total duration: 7s.

Exploding Pie Chart Highlight. Dark background (#212121). Pie chart (250px diameter, centered) with three equal slices (120° each): Red (#E53935), Yellow (#FDD835), Blue (#1E88E5). Animation (8s): 0-3s: All three slices draw in radially simultaneously from 0° to 360°. 3-4s: Hold complete circle. 4-5.5s: Yellow slice 'explodes' by shifting 30px outward from the center along its bisecting angle, while others stay put. 5.5-8s: Label 'Top Seller' fades in next to Yellow slice. Hold. Total duration: 8s.

Activity Rings (Concentric). Black background. Three concentric donut rings (thickness 20px each). Outer ring (300px diameter, red #FF5252), Middle ring (240px, green #69F0AE), Inner ring (180px, blue #448AFF). Animation (7s): 0-1s: All background tracks fade in (dimmed versions of colors). 1-3s: Outer ring draws to 80% (288°). 1.5-3.5s: Middle ring draws to 60% (216°). 2-4s: Inner ring draws to 40% (144°). (Overlapping sequential stagger). 4-7s: All rings hold. Total duration: 7s.

Segmented Gauge Meter. White background. Half-circle gauge (300px width, 150px height, flat bottom). Divided into three equal colored conic-gradient segments: Red (0-60°), Yellow (60-120°), Green (120-180°). Animation (6s): 0-2s: The colored segments sweep in from left (0°) to right (180°) revealing the gauge. 2-3s: Hold. 3-4s: A dark grey needle (base at bottom center) sweeps from 0° to 150° (landing in the green zone). 4-6s: Needle wobbles slightly (150° -> 148° -> 152° -> 150°) settling perfectly. Total duration: 6s.

Sequential Pie Chart Reveal. White background. A centered pie chart with 320px diameter. Animation (8s): 0-2s: Blue slice draws radially from 0° to 144°. 2-4s: Green slice draws from 144° to 234°. 4-6s: Orange slice draws from 234° to 306°. 6-7s: Purple slice completes the circle from 306° to 360°. 7-8s: Completed pie chart holds static. Total duration: 8s.

Animated Horizontal Bar Chart. Light grey background (#EEEEEE). Four horizontal bars stacked vertically with 30px spacing. Total duration: 8s.

Total duration: 7s.

Three-Step Funnel Chart. Light background. Three stacked trapezoids forming a funnel (centered). Top tier (Blue #2196F3, 300px wide top, 200px wide bottom, 80px tall). Connecting Line Graph (3 Data Points). Grid background (faint grey lines). Three connected line segments representing a graph (lines are 4px thick, blue #1976D2). Animation (8s): 0-2s: Line 1 draws from A to B. 2-4s: Line 2 draws from B to C. 4-6s: Line 3 draws from C to D. 6-8s: Three solid blue circular dots (16px) pop in (scale 0->100% with bounce) at points B, C, and D simultaneously. Total duration: 7s.

Horizontal Stacked Bar Chart. Grey background (#EEEEEE). A single horizontal bar (height 60px, total width 500px, rounded ends). Radial Bar Chart (Polar Area). Dark background. Center origin. Three bars that grow outward radially (like thick pie slices extending outward to different lengths). Slice 1 (Magenta, extends 150px). Animation (7s): 0-1s: Inner circle (origin point) scales in. 1-2.5s: Slice 1 grows outward from center. 2-3.5s: Slice 2 grows outward. 3-4.5s: Slice 3 grows outward. 4.5-7s: Entire formation rotates slowly 45° clockwise. Total duration: 7s.

Scatter Plot Generation. White background. L-shaped axes (X and Y, 2px black lines). Total duration: 9s.

Pyramid Hierarchy Chart. Light blue background. A triangle (300px base, 300px height) divided horizontally into 4 sections (using 4 stacked divs with triangle/trapezoid clipPaths). Comparison Split Bar (Tug-of-War). White background. One horizontal bar (500px wide, 40px tall, centered). Left half is Red, Right half is Blue. Text '40%' on red, '60%' on blue. Total duration: 6s.

Radar/Spider Chart Expansion. Dark background. Faint background graphic of concentric pentagon web lines. In the center, a colored, semi-transparent pentagon shape (Green #4CAF50, 50% opacity). Animation (7s): 0-2s: The web lines fade in. 2-5s: The green pentagon shape animates from a tiny center point expanding outward. Its 5 vertices expand at different speeds to unequal lengths, forming an irregular, skewed data polygon. 5-7s: Dots appear at the 5 outer vertices. Total duration: 7s.

Sales Bar Chart Dashboard. Background: light grey #F5F5F5. Title: 'Sales by Product Category' (30pt bold #2c3e50, top-center, 50px). Five vertical bars (70px width, 30px gaps), baseline 75% y. Product A: blue #2196F3, height 200px. Product B: green #4CAF50, height 240px. Product C: orange #FF9800, height 180px. Product D: purple #9C27B0, height 160px. Product E: red #E74C3C, height 190px. Above each bar: circular letter badge representing the product (40px diameter, white background, 50% border radius, containing letters A, B, C, D, and E in 20pt bold text matching their respective bar colors, centered). Below bars: product names (white 18pt on semi-transparent dark). Y-axis: 0K, 50K, 100K, 150K, 200K, 250K (16pt white labels). Horizontal gridlines (1px white 0.2 opacity). Values on bars: count numbers (16pt bold white, centered on bar). Canvas 1920x1080px. Animation (11s): 0-0.5s Title fades. 0.5-1s Y-axis labels and gridlines fade. 1-1.5s Circular badges appear above their bar positions with fade-in. 1.5-7s Bars grow 0 to target height sequentially L-R (each bar 0.8s, stagger 0.3s), ease-out. Rounded top corners 6px. 7-8.5s Value labels animate counting from 0 to target (1.5s). Color bar borders glow slightly (1px shadow). 8.5-10s Product names fade in below bars. 10-11s Hold with subtle shadow glow pulsing on bars. Total duration: 11s.

Glowing Dashed Circle Loader. Dark background (#121212). A centered circle with 220px diameter and 8px stroke thickness. The stroke uses a dashed pattern creating rotating segments around the circumference. Stroke color is cyan (#00E5FF) with a soft outer glow blur. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Circle fades in. 1-6s: The dashed stroke rotates continuously around the center while the glow intensity increases slightly. 6-7s: The glow softens and the loader holds. Total duration: 7s.

Gradient Sweep Rectangle. White background. A large rounded rectangle (420px width, 220px height, 24px corner radius) centered on screen. The rectangle uses a linear gradient fill transitioning from purple (#9C27B0) to blue (#1E88E5). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Rectangle fades in. 2-5s: The gradient angle rotates smoothly from 0° to 360° creating a sweeping color motion across the shape. 5-6s: Gradient motion slows and holds. Total duration: 6s.

Dashed Path Drawing With Glow. Dark background (#212121). A curved path line runs horizontally across the screen with 6px thickness using a dashed stroke pattern. Total duration: 8s.

Rotating Gradient Ring With Motion Blur. Black background. A centered circular ring with 260px diameter and 20px thickness. Animation (7s): 0-1s: Ring fades in. 1-5s: The ring rotates continuously around its center while the gradient angle rotates creating a moving color spectrum. Dashed Square Orbit Indicator. Dark grey background (#2A2A2A). A square frame (240px size) with 6px dashed stroke lines centered on screen. Stroke color is neon green (#69F0AE). Bar Glow Emphasis - Highlighting Top Performer. White background. Vertical bar chart with four bars labeled Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4. Simultaneously Q1, Q2, and Q3 bars dim to 0.5 opacity and slightly desaturate to create comparative focus. 4.8-8s the Q4 glow continues pulsing in a 1 second cycle while other bars remain dimmed. Final state holds at 8 seconds with Q4 clearly emphasized as the top performer.

Grouped Bar Chart - Product Sales by Month. Background white (#FFFFFF). Title 'Product Sales by Month' in bold (#2C3E50) 32pt centered with 50px top margin. Six visible month groups Jan–Jun. At 5s the Electronics slice (32%, color #FF6B6B) pulls outward radially from the pie center by 50px while rotating +15° around its own center. A radial gradient overlay appears on this slice transitioning from bright #FF6B6B at the outer edge to darker #C62828 toward the center with soft radial falloff. Simultaneously the remaining slices (Software, Services, Support, Training, Other) dim to 0.4 opacity and slightly desaturate to reduce emphasis. A glow appears around the pulled Electronics slice using a 3px shadow (#FF6B6B) that pulses with a 0.8s cycle. 6–7s a small annotation arrow appears pointing toward the pulled slice with label 'Largest Market Segment' in bold white (12pt) placed inside a semi-transparent dark background box. The label fades in with a subtle horizontal wiggle (±2px). 7–12s hold state with the Electronics slice remaining pulled out and rotated while glow continues pulsing and the annotation stays visible.

Scatter Plot Generation. White background. L-shaped axes (X and Y, 2px black lines). Within the axes, 10 small circles (12px diameter, semi-transparent purple #9C27B0) scattered at different X/Y coordinates. Animation (9s): 0-2s: Y-axis draws bottom to top. X-axis draws left to right. 2-7s: The 10 dots pop in (scale 0->100%) sequentially one by one (0.5s stagger each). 7-9s: A trendline (dashed grey) draws diagonally through the cluster. Total duration: 9s.

Speedometer Progress to Target. Dark blue background (#1A237E). Circular gauge (260px). The track is an un-filled dashed line (grey). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Text 'Current Speed' fades in above. 1-4s: A solid cyan (#00E5FF) arc draws along the track from 0° to 220°. Simultaneously, a center number counts from 0 to '85'. 4-6s: Outer glow fades in around the cyan arc. 6-8s: Hold. Total duration: 8s.

Rotating Wheel Spokes. Light background. One circle (black #212121, 160px diameter) placed at the center acts as a wheel rim. Inside the circle four thin lines (160px length, 6px thickness, gray #616161) pass through the center forming cross spokes: one horizontal, one vertical, and two diagonal lines at 45°. All lines are fixed to the center of the circle like wheel spokes. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Circle and all four lines fade in together at center. 1-6s: The entire wheel system (circle and all attached lines) rotates continuously around its center completing two full rotations (0° -> 720°). The spokes remain fixed relative to the circle and rotate together with it. 6-8s: Rotation gradually slows until the wheel stops at its original orientation. Total duration: 8s.

Basic Pie Chart Reveal. White background. Circle (300px diameter, centered). Acts as a pie chart with two slices: Blue (#2196F3) for 70%, Green (#4CAF50) for 30%. Animation (6s): 0-2s: Blue slice draws in radially from top center (0°) to 252° (using conic-gradient sweep). 2-4s: Green slice draws in from 252° to 360°, completing the circle. 4-6s: Hold complete. Total duration: 6s.

Rocket Launch. Dark space background (#0F0F23). A white rocket (120px) starts at the bottom center and launches upward to the top with ease-in over 3s. Flame effect: an orange fire asset (60px) trails below the rocket. Both fade in over 0.5s first. Total duration: 5s.

Day-to-Night Sky Transition with Sun, Moon, Clouds, and Tree. Background starts as a bright daytime sky: solid light blue (#87CEFA) filling the canvas. At the top center, a yellow sun asset (120px) is visible; at the bottom center, a simple green hill with a dark green tree asset (160px tall) rooted slightly left of center, trunk brown (#5D4037), foliage green (#2E7D32). Two white cloud assets (each 180px wide) begin off-screen on the left side at mid‑height. Total canvas 1920×1080px.

Animation timeline (10 seconds total): 0–1s: Scene fades in from black; sun, tree, and hill all fade from 0% to 100% opacity. 1–5s: Sun moves smoothly from near the top center down toward the right horizon line, following a gentle arc, using ease‑in‑out; simultaneously, the sky background color animates from light blue (#87CEFA) to a deep twilight blue (#0D47A1). 1–6s: Clouds drift from left to right across the sky: Cloud 1 enters at 1s and crosses to the right edge by 5s with slow, linear motion; Cloud 2 starts slightly later at 2s and exits by 6s, both maintaining soft movement. 5–8s: As the sun reaches the horizon and fades out to 0% opacity, a moon asset (110px, pale yellow #FFF9C4) fades in at the upper left and slowly rises slightly upward and to the center, ease‑out. During this period the background shifts from twilight blue (#0D47A1) to almost night black‑blue (#020817), and overall scene brightness subtly decreases. 6–10s: Clouds become darker grey‑blue (#546E7A) at 70% opacity and continue drifting slowly rightward, looping if necessary. The tree remains static but its colors darken slightly to suggest night. 8–10s: Final state holds with dark sky, visible moon high in the sky, dim clouds, and silhouetted tree, with no further motion except slow cloud drift. Total duration: 10s.

Four Object Merge and Transform Sequence. Canvas 1920x1080 with dark background (#111111). Scene center is the exact middle of the canvas. Four circles (diameter 120px) of different colors start from the four cardinal directions outside the frame and move toward the center. Top circle color red (#E53935) initial position (960px, -120px). Bottom circle color blue (#1E88E5) initial position (960px, 1200px). Left circle color green (#43A047) initial position (-120px, 540px). Right circle color yellow (#FDD835) initial position (2040px, 540px). All circles travel linearly toward the center position (960px, 540px) and perfectly overlap there. When overlapped they visually merge into a single cluster of four stacked circles. Animation (12s total): 0–2s circles move from their starting positions toward the center using smooth ease-in-out motion and arrive exactly at the center simultaneously. 2–4s circles remain merged at the center with no movement. During this hold the top-origin circle (red) smoothly transitions its color from red (#E53935) to purple (#8E24AA) over 2 seconds while the other circles remain unchanged. 4–5s all circles fade out together while remaining centered. 5–6s four squares appear at the center stacked on the same midpoint position. Squares size 100px each with different colors: square A cyan (#00ACC1), square B pink (#EC407A), square C lime (#7CB342), square D amber (#FFA000). Initial scale for all squares is 0 (not visible). 6–8s squares scale up simultaneously from scale 0 to scale 1.0 while remaining centered. 8–9s squares hold fully visible at the center. 9–11s squares move outward from the center toward four directions while maintaining their size: cyan square moves upward to (960px, -120px), pink square moves right to (2040px, 540px), lime square moves downward to (960px, 1200px), amber square moves left to (-120px, 540px). Movement uses smooth ease-in motion. 11–12s squares fade out as they exit the frame. Entire scene maintains centered composition with symmetrical motion.

Four Object Merge and Transform Sequence. Background dark (#111111). Canvas 1920x1080 with center-middle as the scene anchor. Four circles (diameter 120px) of different colors start from the four cardinal directions outside the frame and move toward the center. Top circle color red (#E53935) begins at top-center outside the frame. Bottom circle color blue (#1E88E5) begins at bottom-center outside the frame. Left circle color green (#43A047) begins at middle-left outside the frame. Right circle color yellow (#FDD835) begins at middle-right outside the frame. All circles travel toward the center-middle and perfectly overlap there, visually forming a stacked cluster. Animation (12s): 0–2s circles move from their starting directions (top-center, bottom-center, middle-left, middle-right) toward the center-middle using smooth ease-in-out motion and arrive simultaneously. 2–4s circles remain merged at the center-middle. During this hold the top-origin circle transitions its color smoothly from red (#E53935) to purple (#8E24AA) over 2 seconds while the other circles remain unchanged. 4–5s all circles fade out together while staying centered. 5–6s four squares appear stacked at the center-middle. Each square size 100px with different colors: square A cyan (#00ACC1), square B pink (#EC407A), square C lime (#7CB342), square D amber (#FFA000). Initial scale of all squares is 0 (not visible). 6–8s squares scale up simultaneously from scale 0 to scale 1.0 while remaining centered. 8–9s squares hold fully visible at the center-middle. 9–11s squares move outward from the center toward four directions while maintaining their size: cyan square moves toward top-center outside the frame, pink square moves toward middle-right outside the frame, lime square moves toward bottom-center outside the frame, amber square moves toward middle-left outside the frame using smooth ease-in motion. 11–12s squares fade out as they exit the frame. The entire sequence maintains symmetrical motion and centered composition using directional positioning (top, bottom, left, right, center, middle) rather than absolute pixel coordinates.

Rolling Vehicle Motion with Parent–Child Wheel System. Background light neutral (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal rectangle acts as the parent body of the system. Rectangle size approximately wide 500px and height 200px with dark blue color (#4A90E2). The rectangle initially starts slightly outside the left side of the frame at middle vertical alignment and moves across the screen toward the right side. Two circular ring wheels are attached to the rectangle along its bottom edge. The circles are children of the rectangle so they move together with the parent body. Each wheel is a hollow circle ring (diameter 160px) with dark grey stroke (#333333) and transparent center. One wheel is attached near the bottom-left edge of the rectangle and the other wheel is attached near the bottom-right edge of the rectangle. Inside each circle there are four straight line spokes connected from the center to the ring edges forming a wheel-like structure. The four lines are evenly spaced forming a cross-wheel pattern at 0°, 90°, 45°, and 135° angles giving the appearance of mechanical spokes. Animation (10s): 0–1s the rectangle with both wheels enters smoothly from the left side into the visible canvas area while maintaining middle vertical alignment. Because the wheels are children of the rectangle they remain fixed relative to the rectangle's bottom edges. 1–9s the entire rectangle system continues moving horizontally from left toward the right side of the screen with steady linear motion. During this motion both circular wheels rotate continuously around their Z-axis to simulate rolling wheels. The spoke lines rotate together with their respective circle parents so the whole wheel rotates as one unit. The rotation speed remains constant to match the forward movement of the rectangle body. 9–10s the vehicle body and its wheels exit the frame toward the right side while the wheels continue rotating until they leave the screen. Throughout the animation the hierarchical structure remains intact where the rectangle is the parent object and both wheels with their spokes are child objects attached to the bottom-left and bottom-right edges of the rectangle. The entire composition maintains consistent center alignment vertically while moving horizontally across the scene.

Rolling Vehicle Motion with Parent–Child Wheel System and Cat Rider. Background light neutral (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal rectangle acts as the parent body of the system. Rectangle size approximately wide 500px and height 200px with dark blue color (#4A90E2). The rectangle initially starts slightly outside the left side of the frame at middle vertical alignment and moves across the screen toward the right side. Two circular ring wheels are attached to the rectangle along its bottom edge. The circles are children of the rectangle so they move together with the parent body. Each wheel is a hollow circle ring (diameter 160px) with dark grey stroke (#333333) and transparent center. One wheel is attached near the bottom-left edge of the rectangle and the other wheel is attached near the bottom-right edge of the rectangle. Inside each circle there are four straight line spokes connected from the center to the ring edges forming a wheel-like structure. The four lines are evenly spaced forming a cross-wheel pattern at 0°, 90°, 45°, and 135° angles giving the appearance of mechanical spokes. Sitting on top of the rectangle is a small cartoon cat which is also a child object of the rectangle. The cat is positioned at the top-center edge of the rectangle body as if riding the moving platform. The cat body is light orange (#FFB74D) with darker ear tips (#E65100), simple round head, triangular ears, small black eyes and a curved tail pointing upward. Because the cat is attached to the rectangle parent it remains perfectly fixed to the top of the rectangle and travels together with the entire system. Animation (10s): 0–1s the rectangle with both wheels and the cat rider enters smoothly from the left side into the visible canvas area while maintaining middle vertical alignment. Because the wheels and cat are children of the rectangle they remain fixed relative to their attachment points on the rectangle. 1–9s the entire rectangle system continues moving horizontally from left toward the right side of the screen with steady linear motion. During this motion both circular wheels rotate continuously around their Z-axis to simulate rolling wheels. The spoke lines rotate together with their respective circle parents so the whole wheel rotates as one unit. The cat remains sitting steadily on the top of the rectangle maintaining its upright orientation while traveling across the screen. 9–10s the vehicle body, wheels, and cat rider exit the frame toward the right side while the wheels continue rotating until they leave the screen. Throughout the animation the hierarchical structure remains intact where the rectangle is the parent object and both wheels with their spokes plus the cat rider are child objects attached respectively to the bottom-left, bottom-right, and top-center edges of the rectangle. The entire composition maintains consistent center alignment vertically while moving horizontally across the scene.

Order Status Timeline Progress Animation. Background light neutral (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A long horizontal rectangle strip acts as a timeline progress bar placed at center-middle of the canvas. The strip has rounded corners and light grey base color (#E0E0E0). The rectangle begins filling from the left side with a colored progress fill (#4CAF50) representing the order progress. Along the strip three status labels are positioned evenly from left to right: 'Order Placed', 'Order Processing', and 'Order Completed'. Animation (10s): 0–3s the progress fill starts from the left edge and smoothly expands toward the first status label 'Order Placed'. When the progress reaches this position a small circle appears directly on the strip at the same horizontal position and a check mark tick icon appears inside the circle indicating completion of the first step. 3–7s the rectangle progress continues filling toward the second status label 'Order Processing'. When the fill reaches this point another circle marker appears on the strip aligned with the text and a tick check appears inside the circle showing the second stage is completed. 7–10s the progress fill continues expanding until it reaches the final label 'Order Completed'. When the progress reaches this position a final circle marker appears aligned with the label and a check mark icon appears inside the circle. At the end the entire progress strip is fully filled showing the order process completed with three visible check circles along the timeline.

Two Circles Merge Into Square. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Two circles (diameter 120px each): circle A red (#E53935) positioned at middle-left (200px left of center), circle B blue (#2196F3) positioned at middle-right (200px right of center). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Both circles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Both circles move toward canvas center using ease-in-out, arriving at the same position and overlapping. 3-4s: Both circles scale down from 100% to 0% while a purple (#7B1FA2) square (size 140px) scales up from 0% to 100% at center, creating a merge-transform effect. 4-6s: Square holds at center. 6-7s: Square rotates 45 degrees with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Rocket Launch. Dark space background (#0F0F23). Canvas 1920x1080. A white rocket asset (120px) starts at bottom-center. An orange fire asset (60px, color #FF6B35) positioned directly below the rocket. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Both rocket and fire assets fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-4s: Rocket moves upward from bottom-center toward off-screen-top with ease-in acceleration. Fire asset trails below the rocket following the same upward path. 4-5s: Both assets fade out from opacity 1 to 0. 5-6s: Hold dark background. Total duration: 6s.

Two-Segment Pie Chart. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A pie chart (300px diameter) centered on canvas. Two segments: blue (#2196F3) representing 60% (216 degrees), green (#4CAF50) representing 40% (144 degrees). Segments sum to 100%. Animation (6s): 0-3s: Pie sweeps radially from 0 degrees to 360 degrees with ease-out. Blue segment fills first from 0 to 216 degrees, then green segment fills from 216 to 360 degrees. 3-6s: Hold complete pie chart. Total duration: 6s.

Bouncing Red Circle. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A red circle (#E53935, diameter 120px) starts at middle-left. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Circle fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Circle moves horizontally from middle-left to middle-right with bounce easing, bouncing three times with decreasing arc heights (200px, 120px, 60px above the center line). 5-6s: Hold final position at middle-right. Total duration: 6s.

Loading Progress Bar. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal rectangle strip (600px wide, 40px tall, rounded corners 20px) centered on canvas with light grey base color (#E0E0E0). A green (#4CAF50) fill rectangle inside the strip starts at 0px width. Text '0%' (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) centered above the bar. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Base bar and text fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Green fill grows from 0px to 600px width from left to right with ease-in-out. Simultaneously the text counts from '0%' to '100%'. 6-7s: Text scales from 100% to 115% and back to 100% with ease-in-out as a completion pulse. 7-8s: Hold completed state. Total duration: 8s.

Triangle Pattern Formation. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Three circles (diameter 120px each): red (#E53935), blue (#2196F3), and green (#4CAF50). Initial positions: red circle at bottom-left, blue circle at bottom-right, green circle at top-center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: All circles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Red circle moves to middle-left, blue circle moves to middle-right, green circle remains at top-center, forming a triangle pattern with ease-in-out. 3-6s: Hold triangle pattern. 6-7s: All circles scale up by 20% and back to original size with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Car Drives Across Screen. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A blue car asset (120px, color #2196F3) starts at off-screen-left. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Car fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Car moves horizontally from off-screen-left to off-screen-right across the center line with ease-in-out. 5-6s: Hold final position off-screen-right. Total duration: 6s.

Quarterly Sales Bar Chart. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. A bar chart with four vertical bars representing Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4 sales data, centered on canvas. Bars are evenly spaced with 100px width each. Colors: Q1 red (#E53935), Q2 blue (#2196F3), Q3 green (#4CAF50), Q4 yellow (#FDD835). Heights: Q1 300px, Q2 450px, Q3 400px, Q4 350px. Labels 'Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4' (24px Arial, black #000000) below each bar. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Bars and labels fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Bars grow vertically from 0px to their respective heights with ease-in-out. 5-7s: Hold final bar heights. 7-8s: Bars and labels fade out from opacity 1 to 0 with ease-in. Total duration: 8s.

Typing Text Animation. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Text 'Hello World!' (48px Arial bold, black #000000) starts at center. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Text cursor blinks at start position with ease-out. 0.5-5s: Text types out letter by letter from left to right with ease-in-out, each letter appearing sequentially. 5-6s: Hold complete text. Total duration: 6s.

Sunset and Moonrise. Dark space background (#1A1A2E). Canvas 1920x1080. A yellow sun asset (120px, color #FDD835) starts at top-center. A white moon asset (120px) starts at off-screen-bottom. Animation (8s): 0-0.5s: Sun fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-3s: Sun moves downward from top-center to off-screen-bottom with ease-in-out. 3-4s: Sun fades out from opacity 1 to 0. 4-4.5s: Moon fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 4.5-7s: Moon moves upward from off-screen-bottom to top-center with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final position of moon at top-center. Total duration: 8s.

Two Triangles Merge Into Diamond. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Two triangles (140px base, 140px tall each): triangle A red (#E53935) positioned at middle-left (200px left of center), triangle B blue (#2196F3) positioned at middle-right (200px right of center). Animation (8s): 0-1s: Both triangles fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Both triangles move toward canvas center using ease-in-out, arriving at the same position and overlapping. 3-4s: Both triangles scale down from 100% to 0% while a purple (#7B1FA2) diamond shape (size 140px wide, 140px tall) scales up from 0% to 100% at center, creating a merge-transform effect. 4-6s: Diamond holds at center. 6-7s: Diamond rotates 45 degrees with ease-in-out. 7-8s: Hold final state. Total duration: 8s.

Three Squares Stack and Fall. White background (#FFFFFF). Canvas 1920x1080. Three squares (each 120px, red #E53935, blue #2196F3, green #4CAF50) start spread out horizontally at bottom-center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Squares fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Squares move vertically to stack at center with ease-in-out, red at bottom, blue in middle, green on top. 3-5s: Hold stacked position. 5-7s: Squares fall sequentially from top to bottom with bounce easing, each square bouncing twice before settling at bottom-center. 7-8s: Hold final fallen state. Total duration: 8s.

Step-by-Step Timeline with Check Marks. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A horizontal timeline with five evenly spaced circles (diameter 60px) centered horizontally on canvas. Each circle is grey (#9E9E9E) initially. A green checkmark asset (size 40px) appears inside each circle. Animation (10s): 0-1s: Timeline fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-2s: First circle fills with green (#4CAF50) and checkmark appears with ease-in. 2-3s: Second circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 3-4s: Third circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 4-5s: Fourth circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 5-6s: Fifth circle fills with green and checkmark appears with ease-in. 6-8s: Hold completed timeline. 8-10s: Entire timeline scales up slightly (110%) and back to original size with ease-in-out as a completion pulse. Total duration: 10s.

Cloud and Rain Animation. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A cloud asset (120px) positioned at top-center. Multiple blue raindrop assets (each 20px, color #2196F3) start above the cloud. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Cloud fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-3s: Raindrops appear and fall from above the cloud to bottom-center with ease-in-out, spreading out slightly as they fall. 3-6s: Continuous rain effect with raindrops falling in a loop. 6-7s: Raindrops fade out from opacity 1 to 0. 7-8s: Hold final state with cloud. Total duration: 8s.

Notification Bell Vibration. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A bell asset (120px, color #FF9800) positioned at center. Animation (6s): 0-0.5s: Bell fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-4s: Bell vibrates with a rapid left-right motion (10px each side) using ease-in-out, simulating a ringing effect. 4-5s: Bell fades out from opacity 1 to 0. 5-6s: Hold background. Total duration: 6s.

Statistic Cards Display. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. Three statistic cards (each 300px wide, 200px tall, rounded corners 10px) positioned side by side, centered horizontally. Card 1: 'Revenue' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '$0' (48px bold Arial, green #4CAF50) below. Card 2: 'Users' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '0' (48px bold Arial, blue #2196F3) below. Card 3: 'Growth' title (24px bold Arial, dark grey #333333) with number '0%' (48px bold Arial, orange #FF9800) below. Animation (8s): 0-1s: All cards fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Numbers on each card count up smoothly: Revenue from '$0' to '$10,000', Users from '0' to '5,000', Growth from '0%' to '20%' with ease-in-out. 6-8s: Hold final numbers. Total duration: 8s.

Loading Spinner to Check Mark. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. A circular loading spinner (diameter 120px, color #2196F3) centered on canvas. A green check mark asset (120px, color #4CAF50) positioned at center. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Spinner fades in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-5s: Spinner rotates clockwise continuously with linear easing. 5-6s: Spinner scales down to 0% while the check mark scales up from 0% to 100% at center with ease-in-out, creating a transformation effect. 6-7s: Check mark holds at center. 7-8s: Check mark fades out from opacity 1 to 0. Total duration: 8s.

Product Rating Graphic. Light neutral background (#F5F5F5). Canvas 1920x1080. Five star icons (each 60px, color #E0E0E0) aligned horizontally at center, spaced 40px apart. A text element 'Rating: 0/5' (48px Arial bold, dark grey #333333) positioned to the right of the stars. Animation (8s): 0-1s: Stars and text fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 1-6s: Stars fill one by one from left to right, changing from grey to yellow (#FDD835) with ease-in-out, each star filling over 1s. START Pop With Highlight And Underline. Dark background (#1A1A2E). Canvas 1920x1080. A bold text 'START' (72px Arial bold, color #E53935) centered on canvas. A rounded highlight rectangle (final size 520px wide x 120px tall, corner radius 18px, color #2196F3) positioned directly behind the text and centered. A thin underline (4px tall rounded rectangle, final width 360px, color #4CAF50) positioned centered beneath the text with a 20px gap from the text baseline. Animation (7s): 0-0.5s: All elements fade in from opacity 0 to 1 with ease-out. 0.5-1.75s: Text appears with scale pop effect (scales from 0% to 115%) with ease-out. 1.75-3.0s: Text scale settles from 115% to 100% with ease-in. 3.0-4.25s: Highlight rectangle expands behind the text from 0% width to full 520px width from left to right with ease-out. 4.25-5.5s: Underline draws from left to right increasing width from 0% to 360px with ease-out (animated underline draw). 5.5-7.0s: Hold final state with text at 100%, highlight fully expanded, underline fully drawn. Total duration: 7s.
